message:
test(lifecycle): concurrent introspect regression gate for 8sl73 (ibuuh.23)

Regression-gate row for bead coding_agent_session_search-8sl73 (fixed
in commit 6a5f159b). The introspect schema registry used to be
std::collections::HashMap — random-order iteration produced byte-
different response_schemas blocks between runs, silently breaking
every downstream typed-client generator. The fix swapped to BTreeMap
(deterministic sorted iteration); two back-to-back invocations now
produce byte-identical output.

New test concurrent_introspect_readings_agree_after_btreemap_fix
spawns three parallel cass introspect --json invocations against the
same isolated HOME and asserts all three produce identical scrubbed
JSON. If HashMap (or any other non-deterministic iteration order)
regresses into the registry path, this fails the build immediately.

VERIFICATION:
cargo test --test lifecycle_matrix: 66/66 pass, 2 consecutive stable
re-runs.

Follow-up slice on coding_agent_session_search-ibuuh.23; bead stays
open. Also serves as live guardrail for 8sl73 — if the fix is ever
reverted, this row catches it.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
